questionHtml:
Current understanding of DNA is an example of the accumulated discoveries of many scientists. Which scientists are credited with establishing that DNA is the genetic material?

A.  Franklin and Wilkins

B.  Watson and Crick

C.  Meselson and Stahl

D.  Hershey and Chase

meta.title: Current understanding of DNA is an example of the accumulated discoveries of many scientists. Which scientists are credited with establishing that DNA is the genetic material? A. F
